'''Tig Peramis''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] who represented [[Walalla]] and the [[Seventh Security Zone]] until being censured in [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]]. He was not a full senator, but also not a former one, as his position retained some complicated legal clauses.<ref name="Shield of Lies">''[[Shield of Lies]]''</ref>

Tig was present during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]], and conspired with the [[Yevetha]] [[Darama]] [[Nil Spaar]] to capture [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]].
